series_metadata.series_title: BSI - SL Savings and Loan Associations and Savings Banks Board Minutes
series_metadata.series_description: These files are minutes of the Savings and Loan Associations and Savings Banks board. The meetings of the Board are held as requested by the Superintendent of the Ohio Division of Financial Institutions.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: paper copy in operating area imaged and indexed. Upon confirmation that paper copy has been checked quality and completeness, send State Archives. ; Electronic: electronic files two (2) years from date of meeting
